name: Simulated Instant Beef Gravy Packet
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except water or milk together in a small bowl to form a paste.
2. Slowly add the water (or milk) while stirring vigorously. Ketchup will be hardest to blend.
3. Heat to boiling in a skillet or pan containing drippings from the entree.
4. Stir until thickened to the desired consistency.
5. Serve. Substitute milk for water to simulate "country-style cream gravy".
